obligations.rule: Default behavior: validate currency strings with '$' as the symbol, optional symbol, commas as thousands separator, '.' as decimal separator, and 2 digits after the decimal.
obligations.why: Baseline behavior must be validated to ensure the function works as described by default.

obligations.rule: Option `require_symbol`: when true, the currency symbol must be present.
obligations.why: To ensure the function respects the `require_symbol` option.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_space_after_symbol`: when true, a space is allowed after the currency symbol.
obligations.why: To validate that spaces after the symbol are handled correctly when allowed.

obligations.rule: Option `symbol_after_digits`: when true, the currency symbol must appear after the digits.
obligations.why: To confirm that the function correctly validates symbol placement when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_negatives`: when false, negative values are not allowed.
obligations.why: To ensure negative values are rejected when `allow_negatives` is false.

obligations.rule: Option `parens_for_negatives`: when true, negative values must be enclosed in parentheses.
obligations.why: To validate the function enforces parentheses for negatives when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Option `negative_sign_before_digits`: when true, the negative sign must appear before the digits.
obligations.why: To confirm the function enforces the placement of the negative sign before digits when enabled.

obligations.rule: Option `negative_sign_after_digits`: when true, the negative sign must appear after the digits.
obligations.why: To validate the function enforces the placement of the negative sign after digits when enabled.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_negative_sign_placeholder`: when true, a placeholder for the negative sign is allowed.
obligations.why: To ensure the function accepts negative sign placeholders when this option is enabled.
To confirm the function respects custom thousands separators.
To ensure the function respects custom decimal separators.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_decimal`: when false, decimal values are not allowed.
obligations.why: To validate the function rejects decimal values when `allow_decimal` is false.

obligations.rule: Option `require_decimal`: when true, decimal values are required.
obligations.why: To confirm the function enforces the presence of decimal values when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Option `digits_after_decimal`: validate specific numbers of digits after the decimal.
obligations.why: To ensure the function enforces the exact number of digits after the decimal.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_space_after_digits`: when true, spaces are allowed after the digits.
obligations.why: To validate the function handles spaces after digits correctly when allowed.

test_groups.title: Default behavior tests
test_groups.rationale: Validate the default behavior of the function with standard currency formats.

test_groups.title: Require symbol tests
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the function enforces the presence of a currency symbol when `require_symbol` is true.

test_groups.title: Allow space after symbol tests
test_groups.rationale: Validate the function allows spaces after the currency symbol when `allow_space_after_symbol` is true.

test_groups.title: Symbol after digits tests
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the function validates currency strings with the symbol after digits when `symbol_after_digits` is true.

test_groups.title: Disallow negatives tests
test_groups.rationale: Validate the function rejects negative values when `allow_negatives` is false.

test_groups.title: Parens for negatives tests
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the function enforces parentheses for negative values when `parens_for_negatives` is true.

test_groups.title: Negative sign before digits tests
test_groups.rationale: Validate the function enforces the placement of the negative sign before digits when `negative_sign_before_digits` is true.

test_groups.title: Negative sign after digits tests
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the function enforces the placement of the negative sign after digits when `negative_sign_after_digits` is true.

test_groups.title: Custom thousands separator tests
test_groups.rationale: Validate the function respects custom thousands separators.

test_groups.title: Custom decimal separator tests
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the function respects custom decimal separators.

test_groups.title: Disallow decimal tests
test_groups.rationale: Validate the function rejects decimal values when `allow_decimal` is false.

test_groups.title: Require decimal tests
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the function enforces the presence of decimal values when `require_decimal` is true.

test_groups.title: Digits after decimal tests
test_groups.rationale: Validate the function enforces the exact number of digits after the decimal.

test_groups.title: Allow space after digits tests
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the function handles spaces after digits correctly when `allow_space_after_digits` is true.
